org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.graphics

Interface ViewGraphicsUtil.Factory

  • Enclosing class:
    ViewGraphicsUtil

    public static interface ViewGraphicsUtil.Factory
    Factory to create ViewVector2D.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g, boolean antialiasing, boolean isForPrinting)
      Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.
      ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g, boolean antialiasing, boolean isForPrinting, Graphics2DLOD lod)
      Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.

    • Method Detail

      • createViewGraphics

        ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g,
                                boolean antialiasing,
                                boolean isForPrinting,
                                Graphics2DLOD lod)
        Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.
        Parameters:
        g -
        antialiasing - permits to force the anti-aliasing flag for the target graphical context
        isForPrinting - indicates if this graphics environment is for printing or not.
        lod - is the desired Level-Of-Details
        Returns:
        the view vector.

      • createViewGraphics

        ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g,
                                boolean antialiasing,
                                boolean isForPrinting)
        Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.
        Parameters:
        g -
        antialiasing - permits to force the anti-aliasing flag for the target graphical context
        isForPrinting - indicates if this graphics environment is for printing or not.
        Returns:
        the view vector.
